# PERF-228 negative: serial path for a single item (no fan-out)
lang: go
file: PERF-228-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

type Page struct {
	Data []byte
}

func CompressPages(p Page) error {
	// N==1: do the work inline instead of errgroup over a 1-element slice.
	_ = p.Data
	return nil
}
